2603.26653.title: PerceptionComp: A Video Benchmark for Complex Perception-Centric Reasoning
2603.26653.paper_summary: We introduce PerceptionComp, a manually annotated benchmark for complex, long-horizon, perception-centric video reasoning. PerceptionComp is designed so that no single moment is sufficient: answering each question requires multiple temporally separated pieces of visual evidence and compositional constraints under conjunctive and sequential logic, spanning perceptual subtasks such as objects, attributes, relations, locations, actions, and events, and requiring skills including semantic recognition, visual correspondence, temporal reasoning, and spatial reasoning. The benchmark contains 1,114 highly complex questions on 279 videos from diverse domains including city walk tours, indoor villa tours, video games, and extreme outdoor sports, with 100% manual annotation. Human studies show that PerceptionComp requires substantial test-time thinking and repeated perception steps: participants take much longer than on prior benchmarks, and accuracy drops to near chance (18.97%) when rewatching is disallowed. State-of-the-art MLLMs also perform substantially worse on PerceptionComp than on existing benchmarks: the best model in our evaluation, Gemini-3-Flash, reaches only 45.96% accuracy in the five-choice setting, while open-source models remain below 40%. These results suggest that perception-centric long-horizon video reasoning remains a major bottleneck, and we hope PerceptionComp will help drive progress in perceptual reasoning.
2603.26653.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 PerceptionComp，一個手動標註的基準，用於複雜的、長期的、以感知為中心的視頻推理。<lb/>PerceptionComp 的設計使得單一時刻不足以解答問題：回答每個問題需要多個時間上分隔的視覺證據和在聯合和序列邏輯下的組合約束，涵蓋感知子任務，如物體、屬性、關係、位置、動作和事件，並需要包括語義識別、視覺對應、時間推理和空間推理等技能。<lb/>該基準包含 1,114 個高度複雜的問題，涉及 279 部來自不同領域的視頻，包括城市步行導覽、室內別墅導覽、視頻遊戲和極限戶外運動，並且 100% 由人工標註。<lb/>人類研究顯示，PerceptionComp 需要大量的測試時間思考和重複的感知步驟：參與者的時間消耗遠超過之前的基準，當禁止重看時，準確率降至接近隨機（18.97%）。<lb/>最先進的 MLLMs 在 PerceptionComp 上的表現也顯著低於現有基準：我們評估中的最佳模型 Gemini-3-Flash 在五選一的設定中僅達到 45.96% 的準確率，而開源模型則保持在 40% 以下。<lb/>這些結果表明，以感知為中心的長期視頻推理仍然是一個主要瓶頸，我們希望 PerceptionComp 能夠促進感知推理的進展。
2603.26653.author: Shaoxuan Li et.al.
2603.26653.authors: Shaoxuan Li, Zhixuan Zhao, Hanze Deng, Zirun Ma, Shulin Tian, Zuyan Liu, Yushi Hu, Haoning Wu, Yuhao Dong, Benlin Liu, Ziwei Liu, Ranjay Krishna
